name: uniekinc.com
message:
Furniture.

“Uniek is the premier designer, manufacturer and supplier of picture frames and home decor accents for retailers in North America. They sell mirrors, albums, photo frames, art and other home decor. Uniek are a privately owned company headquartered in Waunakee, Wisconsin. Its products are exclusively manufactured in the United States.”
